office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy and oversee county services and departments.
race_blurb: Incumbent Asa Leckie faces Paul Mosbrucker, for whom no detailed platform was available.

candidates.summary: Incumbent commissioner emphasizing tax restraint, core-service budgets, lower-burden regulation, timber revenue, and business partnerships.
highlights: Calls for tax restraint and core-service budgets [S2]
Supports lower-burden regulation and timber revenue [S2]

taxes.basis: Tax restraint is an explicit central campaign commitment.

spending.basis: Core-service budgeting supports modest spending restraint.

experience.basis: Current county commission incumbency establishes a direct governing record.

candidates.summary: Filed candidate without a sufficiently detailed response in the reviewed sources.
highlights: Official and chamber sources verify candidacy [S1][S2]
